providers.name: DigitalOcean
providers.description: Build hardened Snapshots on DigitalOcean. Provisions a Droplet, applies hardening via Ansible over SSH, runs OpenSCAP, then creates a Droplet Snapshot. Use VPC private networking if the Stratum host is also a Droplet in the same region.
providers.connectivity: SSH (public IP by default; set use_private_ip: true for VPC private networking)

credential_fields.label: Use VPC Private IP (requires Stratum host in same region)

providers.name: Google Cloud Platform
providers.description: Build hardened machine images on GCP using Compute Engine. Provisions a VM from a base image, applies hardening via Ansible over SSH, runs OpenSCAP, then creates a GCP Custom Image.

credential_fields.label: Service Account JSON Key (leave blank for ADC)

providers.name: Microsoft Azure
providers.description: Build hardened images as Azure Managed Images. Provisions a VM from a Marketplace or custom image, applies hardening via Ansible over SSH, then captures a Managed Image.

providers.name: Linode / Akamai Cloud
providers.description: Build hardened Private Images on Linode. Provisions a Linode instance from a base image, applies hardening via Ansible over SSH, then creates a Linode Private Image (disk snapshot). Use private networking if the Stratum host is also a Linode in the same datacenter.
providers.connectivity: SSH (public IP by default; set use_private_ip: true for Linode private networking within the same datacenter)

credential_fields.label: Use Linode Private IP (requires Stratum host in same datacenter)

providers.name: Proxmox VE
providers.description: Build hardened VM templates on Proxmox VE. Clones a base template, applies hardening via Ansible over SSH, then converts the result to a reusable Proxmox template.

credential_fields.label: SSH Host for Ansible (IP or DNS of VM)
